name: brave-search
description: Web and local search via the Brave Search API through MCP

files.pack.toml:
[pack]
name = "brave-search"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "Web and local search via the Brave Search API through MCP"
authors = ["PackWeave"]
license = "MIT"
repository = "https://github.com/PackWeave/registry"
keywords = ["search", "brave", "web", "mcp"]

[[servers]]
name = "brave-search"
command = "npx"
args = ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-brave-search@latest"]
transport = "stdio"
tools = ["brave_web_search", "brave_local_search"]

[servers.env.BRAVE_API_KEY]
required = true
secret = true
description = "Brave Search API key — get one at https://brave.com/search/api/"
